commands.review_summary:
This PR makes Slack reply-button/select block actions resolve thread-aware sessions, enqueue untrusted Slack delivery context, request a heartbeat wake, updates heartbeat SDK docs/baseline, adds Slack tests, and includes small version and PR-push script fixes.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main accepts Slack block actions and queues a system event, but the queue path does not carry `threadTs` into session resolution and never requests a heartbeat wake. I did not establish a live Slack click-through reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair job is appropriate: this active maintainer/member PR has green exact-head checks and no blocking code finding, so the remaining action is human landing and scope judgment.
